title: Amauropelta burkartii
taxonomy: Amauropelta burkartii is classified as a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. It belongs to the genus Amauropelta, which is a group of ferns native to South America. The species Amauropelta burkartii is endemic to Argentina. This classification is based on its botanical characteristics and genetic makeup. As a member of the Thelypteridaceae family, Amauropelta burkartii shares similarities with other related fern species.
